title: Trust Signal Stack
formula: Trust = (Consistency x Honesty x Repair) / (Secrecy + Repeated Harm)
tagline: Trust is confidence built from repeated congruence.
reflectionPrompt: Where can attention, care, trust, or compassion become more present without control?
boundaryNote: Do not demand trust; earn and protect it.
derivation: The equation is an intentionally symbolic design pattern: amplifying forces are placed above or before the operator, while stabilizing forces provide buffering, context, or repair.

title: Loneliness Signal Field
formula: Lonely = (Disconnection x Unseen Self x Time) / (Contact + Belonging + Meaning)
tagline: Loneliness asks for real contact, not performance proximity.
reflectionPrompt: What belongs to repair, what belongs to truth, and what belongs to inherited social pressure?
boundaryNote: Not a diagnosis; seek real connection and support when isolation hurts.
derivation: The equation is an intentionally symbolic design pattern: amplifying forces are placed above or before the operator, while stabilizing forces provide buffering, context, or repair.

title: Regret Time-Repair Vector
formula: Regret = (Choice Echo x Consequence Awareness) / (Learning + Repair + Self-Forgiveness)
tagline: Regret becomes useful when it points toward learning and repair.
reflectionPrompt: What needs witness, ritual, expression, or time rather than a forced solution?
boundaryNote: Do not confuse regret with permanent self-condemnation.
derivation: The equation is an intentionally symbolic design pattern: amplifying forces are placed above or before the operator, while stabilizing forces provide buffering, context, or repair.

title: Forgiveness Repair Loop
tagline: Forgiveness cannot be forced; it grows where truth and safety are honored.
reflectionPrompt: Where can attention, care, trust, or compassion become more present without control?
boundaryNote: Never use this to pressure someone to bypass harm or accept unsafe behavior.
derivation: The equation is an intentionally symbolic design pattern: amplifying forces are placed above or before the operator, while stabilizing forces provide buffering, context, or repair.

title: Motivation Spark Engine
formula: Motivation = (Meaning x Energy x Next Step) / (Overwhelm + Shame)
tagline: Motivation starts when meaning finds a step small enough to move.
reflectionPrompt: What is alive, beautiful, playful, meaningful, or possible right now if hurry softens?
boundaryNote: Avoid shame as fuel; sustainable motion needs kindness and scale.
derivation: The equation is an intentionally symbolic design pattern: amplifying forces are placed above or before the operator, while stabilizing forces provide buffering, context, or repair.

title: Acceptance Grounding Equation
formula: Accept = (Truth x Time x Support) / (Resistance + Denial)
tagline: Acceptance is not approval; it is contact with what is real.
reflectionPrompt: What needs witness, ritual, expression, or time rather than a forced solution?
boundaryNote: Do not use acceptance to excuse harm or silence needed change.
derivation: The equation is an intentionally symbolic design pattern: amplifying forces are placed above or before the operator, while stabilizing forces provide buffering, context, or repair.
